title: bud: permit turning off the history
body:
`buildah config --add-history` turns the history for the resulting image explicitly on.  It can be configured also with the BUILDAH_HISTORY environment variable.

* add option to `buildah bud` to disable history

```
$ echo -e "FROM scratch\nENV PATH=/abc\nCOPY . ." > Containerfile
$ BUILDAH_HISTORY=false buildah bud
STEP 1/3: FROM scratch
STEP 2/3: ENV PATH=/abc
STEP 3/3: COPY . .
COMMIT
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 52907c03eaf0 done  
Copying config 80564cf267 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
--> 80564cf2674
80564cf26744eb11868c1606a82d236cb19c5dcaa5b1d19bf59819b51a3ff7e2
$ skopeo copy containers-storage:80564cf2674 oci-archive:zzz.tar
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 52907c03eaf0 done  
Copying config 80564cf267 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
```

zzz.tar:blobs/sha256/80564cf26744eb11868c1606a82d236cb19c5dcaa5b1d19bf59819b51a3ff7e2 contains COPY

> {"created":"2021-09-12T10:49:17.618464676Z","architecture":"amd64","os":"linux","config":{"Env":["PATH=/abc"],"Labels":{"io.buildah.version":"1.22.3"}},"rootfs":{"type":"layers","diff_ids":["sha256:52907c03eaf0202b750160248a8e38b0a1c6cf825164d0f11d048cee6f9f0c28"]},"history":[{"created":"2021-09-12T10:49:17.466221656Z","created_by":"/bin/sh -c #(nop) ENV PATH=/abc","empty_layer":true},{"created":"2021-09-12T10:49:17.619307251Z","created_by":"/bin/sh -c #(nop) COPY dir:199527f3540779c2c9f1ffb5db2bddd6ec5a3c15cc56eb552802b5fdb3b72f13 in . "}]}

→ The history contains `COPY`.
```
$ buildah images --history --json
[
    {
        "id": "80564cf26744",
        "names": null,
        "digest": "sha256:395a16ac21cac5009428f2932fc2c6200fdab8d901a528bf495b372dbea6518c",
        "createdat": "2 minutes ago",
        "size": "3.27 KB",
        "createdatraw": "2021-09-12T10:49:17.618464676Z",
        "readonly": false,
        "history": null
    }
]
```
→ `buildah images --history --json` does not show the history.

comments.body: Because I want to have smaller images and because this information shall be irrelevant.
@dilyanpalauzov Please correct me if i am wrong your intention is to reduce size of tar by removing `history` from config ?
Yes, I think this information is not essential and therefore there must be a way not to include it (in oci-archive:….tar).
The size difference will be negligible but I am fine with this feature.
Yes since its optional on `image-spec` i guess we can also have it as optional https://github.com/opencontainers/image-spec/blob/main/config.md#properties
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Why not add an option --add-hostory defaulted to true.  So users would need to do `buildah bud --add-history=false ...`
Is the purpose of history to reuse layers?  In my case, I do not want to reuse layers.
I think as @rhatdan suggested `--add-history=false` will solve your use-case. I'll implement this.
